text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Build API client functions for builder page","description":"Add all needed API client functions to /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/ekoa/lib/api/client.ts:
- executeAgent(request) - POST /api/v1/execute
- getJob(jobId) - GET /api/v1/jobs/:id
- cancelJob(jobId) - DELETE /api/v1/jobs/:id
- listArtifactTypes() - GET /api/v1/artifacts
- getArtifactInstance(id) - GET /api/v1/artifacts/:id
- createArtifactInstance(artifactTypeId, name) - POST /api/v1/artifacts
- startPreview(artifactInstanceId, sessionId?) - POST /api/v1/preview/start
- stopPreview(previewId) - DELETE /api/v1/preview/:previewId
- getPreview(previewId) - GET /api/v1/preview/:previewId
- getPreviewProxyUrl(previewId) - returns /api/v1/preview/proxy/:previewId/
- createSession() - POST /api/v1/sessions
- updateSession(sessionId, data) - PUT /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId
- getSession(sessionId) - GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId
- inferIntegrations(prompt) - POST /api/v1/artifacts/infer (or similar)
- sendChatMessage(message, history, attachments) - POST /api/v1/chat
- getAgentConfig() - GET /api/v1/agent-config
All functions should use the existing apiFetch helper and follow existing patterns.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-27T21:16:58.830Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"2","subject":"Build Zustand stores for builder page","description":"Create Zustand stores at /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/ekoa/stores/:
1. orchestration.ts - Main builder state store with:
   - Sessions management (list, active, create, delete, rename)
   - Messages per session
   - Per-session job state (jobId, status, output, progress, phase)
   - Per-session preview state (previewId, url, status)
   - Execution options (selectedArtifactTypeId, selectedIntegrations, fieldValues)
   - Quality refinements config (testing off by default)
   - Config wizard state (simplified - single page)
   - Side panel tab (files, output, preview)
   - File tree data
   - Pending attachments
   - Process output (terminal text)
2. artifacts.ts - Artifact types store:
   - Artifact types list
   - Loading state
   - Fetch action
Follow Zustand patterns with persist middleware, use zustand/immer for cleaner state updates if desired.
Reference the original store at /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/app/src/stores/orchestration.ts for types and patterns.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-27T21:16:59.412Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"3","subject":"Build SSE streaming hook and agent execution hook","description":"Create hooks at /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/ekoa/hooks/:
1. useJobStream.ts - SSE streaming hook:
   - Connect to /api/v1/jobs/:jobId/stream
   - Parse all event types (status, output, progress, result, error, complete, usage, deployment, terminal, preview)
   - Auto-reconnect with exponential backoff
   - Buffer replay support
   - Dispatch events to orchestration store
   - Heartbeat handling
   - Cleanup on unmount
2. useAgentExecution.ts - Agent execution orchestration hook:
   - Manages the execute -> stream -> complete lifecycle
   - Calls executeAgent API, then connects SSE stream
   - Handles cancel/stop
   - Updates store with job state
   - Detects app startup from deployment events
   - Triggers preview when app URL available
3. useAppRunningDetector.ts - App detection:
   - Monitors deployment events for app startup
   - Triggers preview panel open
   - Updates preview URL in store
Reference hooks in /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/app/src/hooks/ for patterns.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-27T21:17:00.054Z"}
What's your progress on the 3 tasks (API client, stores, hooks)? Have you completed any of them? Please continue working and mark tasks as completed when done.

{"type":"shutdown_request","requestId":"shutdown-1772227129996@integration-expert","from":"team-lead","reason":"I'm taking over the foundation work since I have full context. Shutting down.","timestamp":"2026-02-27T21:18:49.996Z"}
